svg.aria-label: The 20 amino acids with codons, grouped by chemical property
svg.text: The 20 Amino Acids — Building Blocks of Every Protein
Letter · Name · Chemical property · mRNA codons that encode each one
AlphaFold reads this 20-letter alphabet · Sequence of codons → amino acid chain → 3D protein structure
Codons shown are mRNA triplets (U = uracil) · L, S, R each have 6 synonymous codons · W and M have only one each
